prompt: Create a realistic vertical cosplay fashion portrait with a soft natural light style. In the frame, an adult female over 21 years old leans gracefully on a distressed white wooden bench on a rustic garden balcony. She is positioned diagonally from the bottom-left foreground to the top-right background, with her upper body leaning back, head slightly raised, and arms resting naturally on the bench. Her posture is dramatic, dreamy, and fashionable, with an overall calm and introspective atmosphere, rather than facing the camera directly. She has vibrant red-orange short hair, a fluffy layered bob with bangs partially covering her face. Her face is tilted slightly upward, partially obscured by her hair, revealing a soft profile, fair and translucent skin, subtle eyeliner, light blush, and natural lip color. Her expression is serene and detached, as if immersed in her own thoughts. She is wearing a sailor-collar style cosplay outfit: a white short-sleeved shirt with a navy blue sailor collar, light blue striped trim, and a large matte red bow tied at the chest. The hem of the shirt meets a navy blue pleated skirt with sharp folds, outlining a classic uniform silhouette. She is barefoot, with her legs resting naturally at the edge of the bench, appearing very relaxed. The overall look should remain elegant and appropriate, highlighting character traits with a focus on pose, atmosphere, fabric, color, and setting. The scene is set in an old greenhouse or cottage porch with peeling white-painted wooden walls, light blue window frames, an open glass window, ivy climbing the walls, scattered withered leaves, and a black-and-white checkered tile floor. The bench should show mottled paint, worn edges, and rustic textures. The windows in the background should have a soft blur effect, reflecting dark lights and shadows, with faint green plants visible outside. The lighting should be soft diffused daylight coming from the top left, creating gentle highlights on the red-orange hair, white shirt, red bow, arms, legs, bench, and window frames. Utilize natural shadows under the bench and in the folds of the skirt. The color palette should include vibrant red-orange hair, pure white fabric, navy blue skirt and collar, matte red bow, weathered white wood, light blue window frames, deep green ivy, dried autumn leaves, and soft neutral daylight. Style: Realistic cosplay fashion photography, rustic garden balcony, sailor collar clothing, red-orange bob, reclining bench pose, weathered farmhouse window, ivy and fallen leaves, black and white checkered floor, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, whimsical nostalgic atmosphere, vertical aspect ratio, high detail, no text, no watermark, no logo, no cartoon style, no harsh flash, no distorted body structure, no other people, no clutter, no suggestive underage style.
